summary: Iteration 3 frontend testing complete. Verified dark-mode toggle + localStorage persistence, 4 Projects tabs, Projects kanban (planning/in_progress/on_hold/completed) and Tasks kanban (todo/in_progress/review/done) columns render. Drag-and-drop on DESKTOP works for both Projects and Tasks: cards moved visually, persisted via PUT, and stayed after reload. Meetings calendar now lands on Feb 2026 and renders all 3 seed events (Aurora Sprint Review, Helix Discovery Call, Monthly All Hands). Chat widget panel renders cleanly in dark mode. Mobile @ 414x800: login no overflow, sidebar hidden, hamburger visible, drawer opens & closes on nav, KPIs stack to 2 columns, user-menu text hidden (avatar only), kanban columns stack to 1 column. Mobile drag-and-drop could NOT be confirmed working (see issues). Backend spot-checked: PUT /api/projects/{id} & PUT /api/tasks/{id} both return 200 and persist status changes.

ui_bugs.issue: First click on [data-testid=theme-toggle] immediately after login (within ~3s) is intercepted by the 'Welcome to Bitsparx HQ' sonner toast that sits top-right and overlaps the toggle button. Toggle works fine once the toast auto-dismisses (after ~4s) or via JS click(). Recommend either lowering toast z-index, repositioning toast to bottom-right, or shortening toast duration.

integration_issues.issue: Could not move a card between columns on mobile via simulated pointer events. Columns are stacked vertically so the drag has to traverse a long scroll distance; with dnd-kit PointerSensor (distance:6) the drop target may not be detected because the document scrolls instead of the drag tracking. Consider enabling dnd-kit's TouchSensor with delay+tolerance (delay:150, tolerance:5) alongside PointerSensor for mobile, and/or using AutoScroll plugin so the page auto-scrolls while a card is being dragged. Desktop drag works perfectly.

issues: Tab strip (Projects·Board / Projects·List / Tasks·Board / Tasks·List) wraps onto 2 rows at 414px width. Acceptable but consider horizontal scroll or shorter labels for cleaner mobile UX.

action_items: Optional: reposition or shorten the post-login welcome toast so it does not overlap the theme-toggle button during its 4s lifetime.
Optional but recommended: add TouchSensor (delay:150, tolerance:5) and dnd-kit autoScroll to KanbanBoard so mobile users can drag cards between stacked columns smoothly.
Optional: make the Projects tab strip horizontally scrollable on mobile so all 4 tabs stay on a single row.
critical_code_review_comments: KanbanBoard.js: on PUT failure, setItems(items) restores from the *captured closure* variable which is the pre-optimistic snapshot — correct, but consider also re-fetching from server to stay in sync with any other in-flight changes.
KanbanBoard.js currently sends the entire item back in PUT body. If backend validates extra fields strictly, sending only the changed status would be safer and cheaper.
Layout.js mobile drawer uses fixed inset + z-50 but the overlay is only z-40; if any modal/toast renders above z-50 it can block drawer close-on-outside-click — minor.

ThemeContext sets root.classList synchronously on mount based on localStorage — good, but the initial server-rendered HTML body still uses light-mode CSS variables, which can cause a brief flash of light on first paint when bx_theme=dark. Consider an inline pre-React script in index.html to apply the .dark class before React mounts.
Meetings.js calendar correctly maps start_at strings to Date now — verified 3 events appear; the iter-2 issue is resolved.

Sidebar nav-projects test-id exists in BOTH desktop sidebar (display:none on mobile) and mobile drawer — scoping selectors with [data-testid='mobile-drawer'] [data-testid='nav-projects'] is required for mobile tests.
seed_data_creation: None. Modified Pixelnova Brand Site status temporarily during backend curl test, reverted to 'completed' afterwards. Dragged kanban cards during UI tests — left in moved positions (e.g., one project moved planning -> on_hold, one task moved todo -> review). Main agent can leave or restore as desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle works but the post-login welcome toast (sonner, top-right) overlays it for ~4s — wait for toast or use page.evaluate('document.querySelector(...).click()'). Mobile drawer has duplicate data-testid='nav-projects' (one in hidden desktop sidebar, one in drawer); scope selectors via [data-testid='mobile-drawer']. dnd-kit drag-and-drop works on desktop with mouse.move>=6px then drop; on mobile the test could not confirm it, likely needs TouchSensor + autoScroll in KanbanBoard.js. Backend PUT /api/projects/{id} and /api/tasks/{id} accept full item body with updated status and return 200.
rca of the issue: Mobile drag failure RCA: dnd-kit's PointerSensor uses pointermove + pointerdown which Playwright's page.mouse.* emits. However on mobile-stacked layout the source card and target column are >500px apart vertically; pointer events outside the viewport are not received by columns that haven't been scrolled into view. dnd-kit ships an `autoScroll` option that scrolls the closest scrollable ancestor while dragging — it should be enabled (it's on by default), but our DndContext does not configure modifiers/autoScroll for the document-level scrolling. Suggested fix: add TouchSensor with `{ activationConstraint: { delay: 150, tolerance: 5 } }` alongside PointerSensor and verify autoScroll triggers on body scroll (may need to wrap kanban in an overflow container).
